Polo_Ralph_Lauren_logo_baseball_cap_in_b.name: BEIGE POLO RALPH LAUREN LOGO BASEBALL CAP
Polo_Ralph_Lauren_logo_baseball_cap_in_b.description:
Polo Ralph Lauren washed beige baseball cap with iconic navy polo player embroidery - a timeless preppy essential for casual and smart-casual looks.

Key features:
• Soft washed cotton twill with vintage lived-in finish.
• Navy embroidered Polo player logo on front crown.
• Classic six-panel construction with curved brim.
• Matching ventilation eyelets and top button.
• Adjustable back strap for comfortable fit.
• Premium Ralph Lauren heritage detailing.

Fit & styling: Pairs effortlessly with polos, oxford shirts, chinos, and denim. A refined dad-hat alternative for weekend and travel style.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

_47_New_York_Yankees_Two_Tone_Baseball_H.name: NEW ERA YANKEES CREAM & NAVY TWO-TONE BASEBALL CAP
_47_New_York_Yankees_Two_Tone_Baseball_H.description:
New Era New York Yankees two-tone baseball cap - cream crown with navy brim and raised NY logo for classic MLB street style.

Key features:
• Cream off-white crown panels with navy curved brim.
• Raised navy Yankees NY front embroidery.
• New Era flag logo on left side panel.
• Structured six-panel build with pre-curved visor.
• Breathable embroidered eyelets.
• Adjustable strap closure at back.

Fit & styling: Wear with streetwear, athleisure, or casual weekend outfits. Iconic team cap for fans and collectors.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

New_York_Yankees_New_Era_Black___White_9.name: NEW ERA YANKEES BLACK & WHITE 9FIFTY SNAPBACK
New_York_Yankees_New_Era_Black___White_9.description:
New Era 9FIFTY snapback featuring the New York Yankees logo in black and white - structured flat-brim MLB headwear with bold contrast.

Key features:
• Black crown with white Yankees NY embroidery.
• Flat snapback brim with 9FIFTY structured profile.
• High-quality raised front logo stitching.
• New Era side flag branding.
• Snap closure for adjustable sizing.
• Durable cotton-poly twill construction.

Fit & styling: Ideal for streetwear, game day, and urban casual looks. Pairs with hoodies, tees, and bomber jackets.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

Stunning_Mitchell___Ness_MLB_New_York_Ya.name: MITCHELL & NESS YANKEES LEATHER DAD HAT
Stunning_Mitchell___Ness_MLB_New_York_Ya.description:
Mitchell & Ness premium leather dad hat with New York Yankees branding - luxury heritage MLB cap with a soft unstructured fit.

Key features:
• Genuine leather crown with supple hand-feel.
• Embroidered Yankees NY logo on front.
• Unstructured low-profile dad-hat silhouette.
• Curved brim with tonal stitching.
• Mitchell & Ness heritage quality finish.
• Adjustable strap for one-size comfort.

Fit & styling: Elevate casual outfits with this premium leather cap. Works with denim, leather jackets, and elevated streetwear.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

One Size (adjustable). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.

LA_Dodgers_MLB_Floral_Black_59FIFTY_Fitt.name: NEW ERA DODGERS FLORAL BLACK 59FIFTY FITTED CAP

Key features:
• Black structured 59FIFTY fitted profile.
• LA Dodgers logo with floral pattern accents.
• Flat brim with premium embroidery.

Care: Spot clean or hand wash cold. Air dry flat. Do not bleach. Reshape brim while damp if needed.

Fitted sizes 7-7 5/8 (see size guide). Exclusively at Prince Esquire.
